prompt: Create an STM32 firmware project in /tmp/embedded_eval_motor_ctrl for the NUCLEO-F446RE board (STM32F446RE, Cortex-M4, 512 KiB flash, 128 KiB RAM, FPU fpv4-sp-d16, hard float). Use OpenOCD target stm32f4x and ST-Link. Include a layered application with app/, bsp/, and drivers/ directories, plus CMSIS/HAL placeholders in the README.
assertions: CMakePresets.json has stm32-debug, stm32-release, and stm32-analyze presets
ldscripts/motor_ctrl_flash.ld has 512K flash and 128K RAM lengths
src/ contains app/, bsp/, and drivers/ subdirectories
README.md notes the STM32F446RE target and suggests CMSIS/HAL integration
